{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/88771533?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/VashuVats/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/VashuVats/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/VashuVats/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/VashuVats/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/VashuVats", "id": 88771533, "login": "VashuVats", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg4NzcxNTMz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/VashuVats/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/VashuVats/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/VashuVats/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/VashuVats/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/VashuVats/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/VashuVats", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41422", "cvss": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-89", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')"}], "description": "## Summary

The `/aggregate/:typename` endpoint accepted `column` and `group` query parameters that were passed verbatim to `goqu.L()` — a raw SQL literal expression builder — without any validation. This bypassed all parameterization and allowed authenticated users with any valid session to inject arbitrary SQL expressions.

## Impact

An authenticated low-privilege user could:
- Extract data from any table via subquery: `(SELECT group_concat(email) FROM user_account) as leak`
- Disclose database internals: `sqlite_version()`, `(SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master)`
- Exfiltrate cross-table data via correlated subqueries

The vulnerability was confirmed locally; `user_account.email` values were extracted via a crafted `column` parameter by a non-admin user.

## Root Cause

`goqu.L(userInput)` in `server/resource/resource_aggregate.go` inserted user-supplied query parameters directly into the SQL string with no validation.

## Fix (v0.11.4)

All `goqu.L()` calls on user-controlled input were eliminated and replaced with:
- Structural expression parsing supporting all documented API forms
- Schema-based column validation (column names checked against entity schema via `TableInfo().GetColumnByName()`)
- Exact-match allowlist for aggregate functions (`count`, `sum`, `avg`, `min`, `max`, `first`, `last`) and scalar functions (`date`, `strftime`, `upper`, `lower`, etc.)
- Safe goqu constructors (`goqu.I()`, `goqu.SUM()`, `goqu.Func()`) for all generated expressions
- `allowedTables` scope enforcement: qualified column refs (`table.col`) validated against root entity + explicitly joined tables only

Two additional DoS bugs were fixed in the same commit: `uuid.MustParse` panic on malformed UUID input and an index-out-of-range panic in `ToOrderedExpressionArray` on empty sort expressions.

## Credits

Reported by @VashuVats.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00345, "percentile": 0.26526}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rw2c-8rfq-gwfv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T17:38:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rw2c-8rfq-gwfv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rw2c-8rfq-gwfv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41422"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-07T15:16:06Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T17:38:02Z", "references": ["https://github.com/daptin/daptin/security/advisories/GHSA-rw2c-8rfq-gwfv", "https://github.com/daptin/daptin/releases/tag/v0.11.4", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41422", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rw2c-8rfq-gwfv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/daptin/daptin/security-advisories/GHSA-rw2c-8rfq-gwfv", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/daptin/daptin", "summary": "Daptin: SQL injection via unvalidated goqu.L() calls in aggregate API", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T21:47:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rw2c-8rfq-gwfv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.11.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/daptin/daptin"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.11.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Daptin: SQL injection via unvalidated goqu.L() calls in aggregate API
